about-description: My name is Bălan Eduard I am 26 yo and I consider myself a person who has a infinite passion when it comes to the area of developing websites, platforms and web apps for the vast world of the Internet.

In the last two years I gained experience in frontend development by studying and practicing knowledge from platforms specialized web development (W3­Schools, Mozilla developers, Stack­Overflow), but also from tutorials of advanced developers on You­tube. I also enrolled to web development course of Teachbit platform in 2022.
As a person I am perseverant, flexible, receptive, always eager to le&shyarn new things and give my best in every project that I am involved.
Here is a list of technologies that I've been worked with: HTML, CSS, Boots­trap, Java­Script, JSON, AJAX, Fetch, API
